altText: Deszio Studio website shown in desktop and mobile compositions
heading: Project overview
caption: A responsive digital home shaped around Deszio Studio’s calm, considered interior work.

altText: Deszio Studio client context beside a calm interior scene
heading: Client and business context
caption: The visual direction began with the same qualities found in Deszio’s spaces: restraint, warmth and precision.

altText: Three design challenges covering positioning, structure and conversion
heading: The challenge
caption: The experience needed to feel premium while still making the service and enquiry path easy to understand.

altText: Four project goals for the Deszio Studio website
heading: Project goals
caption: Four practical goals kept the one-month design and development process focused.

altText: Visitor journey from discovery to consultation
heading: User journey
caption: A simple journey moves visitors from an atmospheric first impression into proof, process and contact.

altText: Single-page sitemap connecting the Deszio Studio content sections
heading: Information architecture
caption: The single-page structure keeps each question close and makes consultation available throughout the experience.

altText: Homepage content sequence from promise to consultation
heading: Homepage content map
caption: The content sequence moves from aspiration to evidence, reassurance and action.

altText: Reconstructed final interface structure with annotated hierarchy
heading: Interface structure
caption: This reconstructed blueprint documents the hierarchy and spacing of the final implementation.

altText: Deszio Studio colour and typography system
heading: Visual system
caption: Warm gold, soft neutrals and editorial type give the interface a quiet sense of confidence.

altText: Navigation, portfolio, service and form component examples
heading: Component language
caption: A compact component system keeps navigation, imagery, service detail and forms visually connected.

altText: Final homepage hero, portfolio and service sections
heading: Homepage showcase
caption: The final homepage balances full-bleed atmosphere with clear supporting information.

heading: Key sections
caption: Process, trust and enquiry sections give visitors the practical detail needed to take the next step.

altText: Desktop and mobile versions of the Deszio Studio hero
heading: Responsive experience
caption: The hierarchy is re-composed for mobile rather than reduced into a smaller desktop layout.

altText: Four moments from the complete mobile journey
heading: Mobile journey
caption: The complete mobile experience preserves the project imagery, service explanation and consultation route.

altText: Mobile menu, portfolio browsing and enquiry sequence
heading: Interaction sequence
caption: Small transitions support orientation and feedback without competing with the interior imagery.

altText: Collection of final Deszio Studio interior imagery
heading: Final collection
caption: A restrained frame lets Deszio Studio’s completed spaces remain the centre of the visual story.

altText: Verified project outcome covering delivery, responsiveness and enquiry flow
heading: Outcome
caption: The result is a live responsive website, designed and developed in one month with a direct consultation journey.

heading: Closing frame
caption: A final frame returns the story to the work itself and provides a direct route to the live website.
